message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceParticipant underline false
skinparam ParticipantPadding 25
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor Administrator as Admin
participant ":Main UI" as MainUI
participant ":importReadingsFromFileUI" as ImportUI
participant ":ImportReadingsFromFileController" as Controller
participant ":ListOfGeographicArea" as GeoList
participant "reader:XmlReader" as Reader

Admin <- ImportUI : Request file path
Admin --> ImportUI : file path

ImportUI -> Controller : addReadingsToSensors(reader,path)
activate Controller

Controller -> Reader : importReadingsOfSensor(path)
activate Reader
Reader --> Controller : listOfReadingsDto
deactivate Reader

Controller -> GeoList : getAllSensors( )
activate GeoList
GeoList --> Controller : listOfAreaSensors
deactivate GeoList

Controller -> Controller : setReadingsBySensorIDescription( )

Controller --> ImportUI : number of lines added
deactivate Controller

ImportUI --> Admin : number of lines added
@enduml
